title: 10 best herbal teas for endometriosis
description: Maidenhair tree teas helps with endometriosis because its unique combination of antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins has a calming effect on the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms such as pelvic pain and cramps. The tea's ability to regulate hormonal imbalances also helps to reduce cyst formation and scar tissue growth, promoting a healthier reproductive environment.
